seoTitle: How to Display a Power BI Dashboard on a TV
metaDescription: Set up a Power BI dashboard on an office TV for real-time visibility into sales, projects, or operations during meetings and daily work.
intro: Putting a Power BI dashboard on an office TV keeps important metrics visible to the whole team without anyone needing to open a report manually. This guide covers the setup steps for connecting your dashboard to a TV display and optimizing it for a clear view. It's a practical way to boost transparency and keep discussions grounded in current data.

steps.heading: Connect Power BI to your TV
steps.body: Set up the connection between the device running Power BI and the TV, whether through a direct cable, screen mirroring, or a dedicated display app.

steps.heading: Optimize display settings
steps.body: Adjust the report's layout and resolution settings so text and visuals remain readable from a distance on a larger screen.

steps.heading: Choose the right metrics for the display
steps.body: Select the specific report or metrics best suited for constant visibility, such as sales data, project progress, or operational KPIs.

steps.heading: Set up automated updates
steps.body: Configure your report to refresh automatically so the TV display always reflects current data without manual intervention.

steps.heading: Apply it to team meetings and daily work
steps.body: Use the always-visible dashboard to support meetings and daily discussions, making data a constant reference point for the team.

faq.question: Do I need special hardware to display Power BI on a TV?
faq.answer: Basic setups can work with a standard cable or screen mirroring, though dedicated display solutions can make the connection more reliable.

faq.question: Will the dashboard update automatically on the TV?
faq.answer: Yes, if you configure automatic refresh settings, the dashboard shown on the TV will reflect updated data without manual reloading.

faq.question: What kind of reports work best for a TV display?
faq.answer: Reports with clear, high-level metrics like sales totals or project status tend to work best, since detailed tables can be hard to read from across a room.

faq.question: Can multiple reports rotate on the same TV display?
faq.answer: Depending on your setup, you can configure rotation between different reports or pages to show a variety of metrics over time.

faq.question: Is this setup only useful for large offices?
faq.answer: No, small businesses and teams of any size can benefit from having key metrics visible on a shared screen.
